title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIT Kanpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
